programmes.show_description: Gritty crime drama with Danny Dyer. A criminal flees London in the 1980s and joins the inner circle of a British gangster living in exile on the Costa del Sol.
Western remake with Ron Perlman. An orphan is raised by a cattle baron and trained to uphold the law, but begins to realise that his mentor has taken him in to serve a hidden agenda. (2014)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. A convict escapes from prison seeking retribution for those responsible for putting him there... S6, Ep4
General Stockwell hires the A-Team to find a young girl who is being hunted by the KGB for top secret documents relating to the 'Star Wars' project. S5, Ep12
Vincent attempts to add a publishing magnate to his group of believers, but while the man himself is interested, key figures around him are not who they seem.
Devastating sci-fi thriller starring Stephen Baldwin. When a top secret anti-matter weapon malfunctions it imbues a scientist with incredible abilities, including control of the weather. (2006)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Coming-of-age Western. A teenage boy is orphaned after his alcoholic father is killed in a drunken brawl, setting off a chain of events that turns the impressionable boy into a man. (1972)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Drama with Ray Milland. The Commanding Officer of an RAF Training School must deal with a difficult cadet, whose carefree attitude and refusal to obey orders puts his life at risk. (1957)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Kirk and Spock take supplies to an asylum for the criminally insane, but run into trouble when they're captured by an inmate with the power to assume any shape. S3, Ep14/24
At the Willard Sanitarium, the lead doctor is in cahoots with the alien Invaders, but his brother, also a doctor and a friend of Vincent's, is not so keen on the collaboration.
After returning from a mission, the soldiers of fortune try to get some time off, but a group of mobsters takes them hostage. S5, Ep13
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. A Satanic symbol found at crime scenes suggests abducted children are going to be sacrificed... S6, Ep5
Thriller with Denzel Washington. A CIA agent sent to question a rogue operative arrested for betraying the agency has to protect the prisoner from mercenaries - and resist his mind games. (2012)
Action adventure with Jean-Claude Van Damme. When a mission goes wrong, a CIA agent is forced to team up with a flamboyant arms dealer to protect his pregnant wife from a violent terrorist. (1997)
Thriller with Danny Dyer. A rogue SAS officer sets out to punish the gang that murdered his parents, while the police team up with members of his old unit to stop him completing his mission. (2013)
Action-packed thriller with Bruce Willis. After a botched heist leaves her crime lord boss unhappy, a thief persuades her former lover to help her steal a shipment of rare and valuable gems. (2016)
Legend returns soon.
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Thriller based on true events. It's a toss-up between teeth and the tide when three kayakers find themselves trapped on a small sinking island, stalked by a shark. (2020)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Vincent gets involved when an alien is shot while attempting to steal secret details on military positions in Asia from the United Nations Building.
Just when Vincent thinks he has gathered some serious support in his quest to stop the Invaders, the aliens strike against his secret meeting causing key casualties.
Vincent is summoned to investigate some strange goings on at a ski lodge and soon finds himself in a race against time to transport an important alien hostage.
Vincent attempts to add a publishing magnate to his group of believers, but while the man himself is interested, key figures around him are not who they seem.
At the Willard Sanitarium, the lead doctor is in cahoots with the alien Invaders, but his brother, also a doctor and a friend of Vincent's, is not so keen on the collaboration.
Fast-paced drama with Jack Palance. A group of people, including a pilot, a Frenchwoman and a female FBI agent, hunt for a cache of money hidden in the wreckage of a crashed plane. (1953)
Seafaring adventure with Fred MacMurray. A sailor races to reach a hoard of diamonds stowed on board a Dutch vessel that has sunk in the East Indies before a volcano erupts on a nearby island. (1953)
Drama with Mel Gibson. Two Australians join the army to fight during the First World War, but their youthful idealism is eroded by the harsh reality of the conflict. (1981)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
An astronaut stranded on a distant planet with no hope for rescue learns that a devastating nuclear war has killed his people back home. S5, Ep9
Three National Guardsmen on manoeuvres near the site of the Battle of Little Big Horn are surprised to hear the sound of Indian war cries. S5, Ep10
Crime thriller starring Mark Wahlberg. A former smuggler heads to Panama to protect his brother-in-law from a ruthless drug lord and to score millions of dollars in counterfeit bills. (2013)
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A Russian detective and a Chicago cop put aside their mutual mistrust to catch an escaped Soviet drug baron and bring him to justice. (1988)
